name: Fallback Script When CLI Unavailable
query: List my workflows. I can't install npm or node on this machine.
expected_behavior: Step 1: Check if `conductor` CLI is available — it's not
Step 2: Attempt to install via npm — npm is not available
Step 3: Recognize this is a restricted environment and switch to fallback script
Step 4: Set CONDUCTOR_API path to the bundled scripts/conductor_api.py
Step 7: Present the workflow list to the user
Step 8: Inform user that all subsequent operations will use the fallback script
success_criteria: CLI installation is attempted first before falling back
Fallback is only used after confirming CLI cannot be installed
Plan uses the bundled scripts/conductor_api.py fallback, not raw curl/wget commands
CONDUCTOR_SERVER_URL is verified before making API calls
Script output is parsed and presented clearly to the user
User is informed they're using the fallback and why
Auth tokens are never echoed in output
